quality.rationale: 相对论带电粒子在中心库仑力与均匀磁场共同作用下的圆周运动，需联立洛伦兹力公式与相对论动力学方程进行多步代数推导，物理模型清晰且解答完整。

origin.question: Problem 4.14. A small test particle (mass $m$ , positive charge $q$ ) makes circular orbits around a "fixed" (i.e. very massive) body of positive charge $Q$ . A uniform magnetic field $\underline{B}$ perpendicular to the orbital plane serves to keep the particle in orbit. In the inertial frame in which the central body is at rest, the test charge is seen to circle in the plane perpendicular to the $B$ field with an angular frequency $\omega$ . What is the charge to mass ratio of the test particle in terms of $\omega$ , $R$ , $B$ , $Q$ ?
origin.solution: Solution 4.14. From the Lorentz force equation (Problem 4.11),$$\frac {\mathrm {d} p} {\mathrm {d} t} = \left(- q \omega R B + \frac {q Q} {R^{2}}\right) \underset {\sim} {e}_{r} = m \frac {\mathrm {d}} {\mathrm {d} t} \left(y \underset {\sim} {v}\right) .$$No work is being done on the particle so $\gamma = (1 - \omega^{2}\mathbf{R}^{2})^{-\frac{1}{2}}$ is a constant. Since $\mathrm{d}\underline{\mathrm{v}}/\mathrm{d}t = -\omega^{2}\underline{\mathrm{Re}}_{\mathrm{r}}$ we have$$\mathrm {q} \omega \mathrm {RB} - \mathrm {qQ} / \mathrm {R}^{2} = \mathrm {m} \omega^{2} \mathrm {R} / (1 - \omega^{2} \mathrm {R}^{2} )^{\frac {1} {2}}$$and hence$$\frac {\mathrm {q}} {\mathrm {m}} = \frac {\omega^{2}} {\left( 1 - \omega^{2} \mathrm {R}^{2}\right)^{\frac {1} {2}} \left(\omega \mathrm {B} - \mathrm {Q} / \mathrm {R}^{3}\right)} .$$
